description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a high-wing configuration and a classic red and white color scheme. The fuselage is streamlined and tapers toward the tail, which features a conventional tail design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The wings are straight and mounted above the fuselage, supported by struts connecting to the lower fuselage. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels and a small tailwheel, indicating a taildragger configuration. The cockpit is forward-mounted, enclosed with clear windows, and appears to be designed for one or two occupants.
description: A small, red and white high-wing airplane with a single propeller, fixed taildragger landing gear, and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single propeller, high-mounted straight wings, and the forward cockpit windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, fixed main landing gear, and the taildragger wheel at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, as well as the wing struts.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cockpit windows, wing struts, and the fixed landing gear arrangement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight wings with visible struts and no winglets; no noticeable dihedral or anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and one tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with side windows, likely single or dual seat.
